title: Spicy Ethiopian Chicken Wot
description: A flavorful and spicy Ethiopian-inspired chicken dish made with wot sauce, served with a side of cheese.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the spicy wot sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer the sauce for 5-7 minutes.
Stir in the red pepper flakes, if using.
Season the sauce with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the chicken and sauce over cheese, garnished with pulled chicken.
